private_label_products_v2.core_problem: People struggle to fall asleep due to racing thoughts, light sensitivity, and lack of physical relaxation cues. Traditional sleep masks are too light and don't provide grounding pressure.
private_label_products_v2.target_audience: Adults 25-55 with sleep issues: shift workers, insomniacs, anxiety sufferers, frequent travelers, meditation practitioners
marketing_angles: Anxiety & Stress Relief: 'Like a weighted blanket for your eyes - activates pressure point therapy'
Travel Essential: 'Block out plane lights and hotel brightness - sleep anywhere'
Meditation Aid: 'Deepen your practice with gentle pressure and complete darkness'
Shift Worker Solution: 'Sleep during daylight with blackout + grounding weight'
Digital Detox: 'Replace screen time with pressure therapy before bed'
private_label_products_v2.why_evergreen: Sleep problems are universal and increasing due to screen time and stress. Not seasonal - people need sleep year-round. Based on established weighted blanket science.
differentiation: Cooling gel layer on skin side
Contoured 3D design that doesn't touch eyelashes
bundle_upsell: Sleep bundle: Weighted mask + earplugs + sleep spray
Travel kit: Mask + neck pillow + compression socks
Meditation set: Mask + guided meditation access
Cooling gel inserts (separate purchase)
Silk pillowcase (premium sleep bundle)

private_label_products_v2.core_problem: Cable clutter everywhere - desk, bag, car, bedside. Cables tangle, get lost, look messy. People have 5+ cables per person but no good way to store them.
private_label_products_v2.target_audience: Remote workers, digital nomads, students, minimalists, organization enthusiasts, anyone with multiple devices
marketing_angles: Desk Minimalism: 'The invisible cable solution - clean aesthetic workspace'
Travel Organization: 'No more tangled cables in your bag - grab and go'
Car Essential: 'Keep charging cables tidy and accessible while driving'
Nightstand Solution: 'Bedside cable management that looks good'
Shared Space: 'Family charging station that doesn't look like a mess'
private_label_products_v2.why_evergreen: Device ownership keeps increasing. Cable management is a permanent need. Works with any cable type (USB-C, Lightning, etc.). Not dependent on tech trends.
bundle_upsell: Home office bundle: 6 organizers + cable ties + desk mat
Travel kit: 2 organizers + cable pouch + adapter
Family pack: 12 organizers in mixed colors
Premium metal version for executives
Under-desk mounting brackets

specs.materials: ABS plastic, silicone grip, adhesive backing

private_label_products_v2.core_problem: Fresh produce spoils too fast - Singapore throws away 20% of food. People buy vegetables but they wilt/rot before use. No good storage solution that actually extends freshness.
private_label_products_v2.target_audience: Health-conscious families, meal preppers, busy professionals, eco-conscious consumers, bulk shoppers, home cooks
marketing_angles: Food Waste Warrior: 'Save $500/year on groceries - keep produce fresh 3x longer'
Meal Prep Essential: 'Prep Sunday, eat fresh all week'
Eco Living: 'Reduce food waste, reduce carbon footprint'
Busy Professional: 'Shop once, eat fresh all week - no daily grocery runs'
Family Health: 'Kids eat more veggies when they're crisp and fresh'
private_label_products_v2.why_evergreen: Everyone eats. Food waste is a permanent problem. Not seasonal - produce storage needed year-round. Growing eco-consciousness drives demand.
differentiation: Size variety: herb box, berry box, leafy greens, root vegetables
bundle_upsell: Complete kitchen set: 8 containers + labels + guide
Herb garden kit: Herb saver + seeds + scissors
Meal prep bundle: Containers + portion plates + recipe book
Replacement filter packets (recurring revenue)
Reusable produce bags (mesh set)

specs.materials: BPA-free plastic, silicone seal, activated carbon

private_label_products_v2.core_problem: Furniture slides on hard floors, scratches surfaces, makes noise. People use cheap felt pads that fall off or don't work. Renters worry about floor damage. Parents worry about tipping furniture.
private_label_products_v2.target_audience: Renters, homeowners with new flooring, parents with toddlers, elderly (fall prevention), office managers, furniture restorers
marketing_angles: Floor Protection: 'Save your $10k hardwood floors from scratches'
Child Safety: 'Prevent tipping accidents - furniture stays put'
Renter's Insurance: 'Get your deposit back - no floor damage'
Elderly Safety: 'Prevent falls from sliding chairs and tables'
Noise Reduction: 'Silent chair movement - no more scraping sounds'
private_label_products_v2.why_evergreen: Furniture and floors exist everywhere. Moving/rearranging happens constantly. Safety concerns are permanent. Not dependent on trends.
differentiation: Dual-layer: Felt + rubber for protection + grip
Universal shape kit: circles, squares, strips
Heavy-duty version for sofas and beds
Pre-cut common sizes + custom cut template
bundle_upsell: Complete home kit: 100 pieces in various sizes
Heavy furniture set: Large pads for sofas, beds, dressers
Office bundle: Chair pads + cable management + desk mat
Moving kit: Pads + furniture sliders + corner protectors
Annual replacement subscription

private_label_products_v2.core_problem: Shoes smell bad - from sweat, bacteria, daily wear. Embarrassing in social situations. Sprays mask odor temporarily. People need a reusable, effective solution.
private_label_products_v2.target_audience: Athletes/gym-goers, professionals who wear dress shoes, parents with kids' smelly shoes, anyone with foot odor issues, sneaker collectors
marketing_angles: Confidence Booster: 'Take your shoes off anywhere without embarrassment'
Athlete Essential: 'Gym bag and locker freshness'
Sneaker Care: 'Protect your $500 sneaker investment from odor damage'
Family Solution: 'Kids' shoes, sports gear, whole house freshness'
Travel Must-Have: 'Keep luggage fresh on long trips'
private_label_products_v2.why_evergreen: Everyone wears shoes. Foot odor is universal. Not seasonal. Reusable nature creates recurring brand touchpoint. Growing sneaker culture expands market.
differentiation: Cute shapes: Clouds, animals, sports balls
Scent options: Unscented, tea tree, lavender, citrus
Mesh bag included for gym/locker use
Shoe shape designed to fill toe box completely
bundle_upsell: Family pack: 8 pods + mesh bags + shoe spray
Athlete bundle: 4 pods + gym bag deodorizer + foot powder
Sneakerhead kit: Premium pods + shoe trees + cleaning kit
Travel set: 2 pods + luggage freshener + packing cubes
Replacement charcoal inserts (recurring revenue)

specs.materials: Bamboo charcoal, linen cover, elastic band
